pageShell.runtimeRule: Page states are rebuilt as CyanCruise static webapp assets and do not require IPD Vue, uni-app, Pinia, Vite, uView, axios interceptors, Spring Boot, JPA, Flyway, or Java 17 runtime code.

production.user: Cosmic login context user mapped to CareerLoop userId by platform adapter
production.admin: Cosmic login context user with ADMIN or platform administrator authority mapped to adminId
production.disabledBehavior: Production WebAPI remains identity-required and never falls back to development identity.

development.rule: Development fallback must be explicit and must not be treated as production identity.

identity.rule: Do not call user-owned or admin-owned WebAPI without an explicit platform or development identity.
identity.mismatchRule: When request userId/adminId conflicts with resolved platform identity, the backend boundary rejects the call before invoking protected services.

aiProvider.secretRule: Route metadata records property names and fallback behavior only; endpoint secrets, apiKey values, and Authorization headers must never be stored here.
aiProvider.fallback: When provider is disabled, incomplete, timed out, or invalid, backend returns AI unavailable or scenario fallback without fake successful AI content.

sourceSemantics: production configuration must use property names and tenant-owned values, never checked-in secrets
health checks must be observable through Cosmic-compatible probes or representative WebAPI checks
backup, restore, monitoring, and rollback are release evidence, not migrated IPD bash or Docker runtime

tenantManualChecks.fallback: identity-required or forbidden; never development identity
unavailable or skipped; never production use of local/in-memory file storage
AI unavailable or scenario rule fallback
block production until tenant storage and backup scope are confirmed
block release until probe, monitoring, backup, restore, and rollback evidence are approved

deferredCapabilities: external employment crawling and full-detail pages
customer-specific datamodel, RBAC, and master-data adapters
productionReadiness.secretRule: Only property names, validation intent, fallback behavior, and non-sensitive command strings may be recorded; apiKey values, Authorization headers, endpoint secrets, customer-private values, server addresses, and production credentials are forbidden.
rollback: disable cc001.ai.provider.enabled to return AI unavailable or scenario fallback
disable cc001.file.adapter.enabled to return file unavailable or skipped
disable identity adapter/provider to return identity-required or forbidden
unpublish KDDT menu or route mount
roll back to the previous Cosmic package using customer-approved release procedure

sourceEvidence.runtimeRule: CyanCruise webapp must not require IPD Vue, uni-app, axios, JWT, Spring Boot, JPA, Flyway, or Java 17 implementation files at runtime.

webApis.dto: ResumeDiagnosisRequest -> ResumeDiagnosisResultDto with PDF text extraction and revision suggestions
webApis.fallback: When saved text is empty, extract the owned PDF first; preserve inputs and show a retry or scanned-document message on failure.

webApis.fallback: Return skipped/unavailable and keep in-app notification as canonical.

routes.title: 全景仿真面试
routes.answerTiming: 题目出现后自动倒计时：入门3分钟、常规5分钟、进阶8分钟；超时自动提交或记录未回答。

webApis.name: panorama interview history
webApis.fallback: 摄像头不可用时显示授权提示，并保留全景仿真面试历史。

webApis.name: start panoramic interview
webApis.fallback: 不创建会话并提示用户检查摄像头权限。

webApis.name: submit panoramic answer
webApis.fallback: 保留识别文字并允许用户重试。

webApis.name: finish panoramic interview
webApis.fallback: 保留会话并提示复盘暂时不可用。

webApis.name: start interview
webApis.fallback: Show start unavailable state.

webApis.name: guided interview start
webApis.fallback: 使用中文基础问题开始最多七题的逐题练习。

webApis.name: guided interview answer
webApis.fallback: 保存回答并返回中文基础追问。

webApis.name: guided interview finish
webApis.fallback: 根据有效回答生成基础复盘。

webApis.name: interview messages
webApis.fallback: 提示练习记录暂时无法读取。

platformMounts.title: CyanCruise 工作台
platformMounts.fallback: Show identity-required state when Cosmic login context is unavailable.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Mount as the primary CyanCruise user menu entry under Cosmic webapp resources.

platformMounts.title: 就业
platformMounts.fallback: Show employment feature cards and keep homepage reachable.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Mount as the platform sidebar parent page for employment features.

platformMounts.title: 深造
platformMounts.fallback: Show planned study route cards and keep homepage reachable.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Mount as the platform sidebar parent page for postgraduate, recommendation, and study-abroad planning.

platformMounts.title: 考研
platformMounts.fallback: Show postgraduate exam placeholder and return-to-study action.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Publish only if the tenant wants visible planned study child menus before Agent integration.

platformMounts.fallback: Show recommendation placeholder and return-to-study action.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Publish only if the tenant wants visible planned study child menus before Agent integration.

platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Publish only if the tenant wants visible planned study child menus before Agent integration.

platformMounts.title: CyanCruise 个人情况
platformMounts.fallback: Keep form values and show save unavailable or identity-required state.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: May be linked from the workbench onboarding gate rather than a top-level menu.

platformMounts.title: CyanCruise 今日行动
platformMounts.fallback: Keep workbench navigable and show today-action unavailable state.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Usually reached from the workbench card.

platformMounts.title: 职业测评

platformMounts.title: 简历
platformMounts.fallback: Show no resume or metadata-save unavailable state.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Requires file route availability for upload and preview actions.

platformMounts.title: 文件上传预览
platformMounts.fallback: Show upload, preview, download, delete, or extract-text unavailable state.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Real Cosmic file service adapter remains a later platform integration item.

platformMounts.title: 简历诊断
platformMounts.fallback: Show diagnosis unavailable until resume content exists.
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: Depends on resume and file text extraction contracts.

platformMounts.title: AI 模拟面试
platformMounts.fallback: AI 暂不可用时使用中文基础问题和基础复盘继续文字练习。
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: 复用简历、目标岗位、用户画像和 AI 网关；语音、数字人和身体语言不在本挂载范围。

platformMounts.title: AI 模拟面试记录
platformMounts.fallback: 显示分页记录读取失败状态。
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: 复用既有面试数据库记录，后端固定每页返回 10 条文字面试记录。

platformMounts.title: 全景仿真面试
platformMounts.fallback: 摄像头不可用时允许无摄像头继续；语音转文字不可用时允许手工输入。
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: 需要 HTTPS、浏览器摄像头和麦克风权限；媒体流仅本地预览，不上传、不保存、不进行身体语言分析。

platformMounts.title: 全景仿真面试记录
platformMounts.fallback: 显示全景分页记录读取失败状态。
platformMounts.deploymentNotes: 复用既有面试数据库记录，后端固定每页返回 10 条 VOICE/PANORAMA 面试记录。

platformMounts.deploymentNotes: May remain a workbench deep link until a dedicated page is available.
